text.title: Requirements Traceability Matrix (RTM) Generation and Maintenance Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml or to the universal skip-this-methodology conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Programme requires forward+backward trace AND impact analysis?

conclusion.verdict: Maintain RTM in version control; impact analysis on every change.
Surface orphans; resolve before next baseline.
Light projects: use story-link in tracker as informal trace.

example.description: When the situation matches the leading branch, apply the referenced rule; otherwise traverse to the next condition until the default branch is reached.
